ctxMarket: Attention is focused on the movement of liquidity within Solana, particularly regarding real-world assets (RWAs) and corporate treasury use cases. Broader discussion continues around whether any blockchain, including Solana or Ethereum, has established a lasting competitive advantage.
ctxTalking:
• Solana’s liquidity flows, with notable growth in tokenized real-world assets via Ondo Finance
• Debate over blockchain “moats” as Wintermute’s CEO claims no chain has a defensible edge
• The Solana Foundation president’s statement that crypto gaming is “dead,” despite ongoing brand interest
ctxMatters: Liquidity trends into RWAs may influence the types of projects and protocols gaining traction on Solana. Ongoing skepticism about blockchain defensibility keeps competition high and innovation rapid. The gaming sector’s uncertain outlook could affect developer focus and user engagement on Solana.
ctxSignal:
Signal: Shifts in liquidity toward RWAs and onchain treasury solutions on Solana are shaping platform priorities.
Noise: Headlines declaring the end of crypto gaming, as some brands and companies remain active in the space.
ctxGlossary:
RWA — Real-world asset, such as property or bonds, tokenized on a blockchain
Moat — A sustainable competitive advantage that protects a business from rivals

readMore.title: Ethereum vs Solana – No chain has defensible ‘moat’ yet, warns Wintermute CEO
Solana Foundation president says crypto gaming is dead
Solana Treasury Forward Industries Uses Loan to Buy Back Shares After 89% Price Dive
